retrieved_result: What does Darren mean? \"What does Darren mean? D arren ▼ as a boys' name is pronounced DAR-en. It is of Irish and Gaelic origin, and the meaning of Darren is \"great\". Originally a surname, first used as a given name in the 20th century. In the TV series \"Bewitched\", the leading man was named Darren. ASSOCIATED WITH Da
